message:
fix: WASI normalizePath trailing /. + /tmp listdir test

- normalizePath now strips trailing "/." (e.g., "tmp/." → "tmp"),
  fixing os.listdir('/tmp') which was failing with ENOENT
- fd_readdir already handles FD_TMP_PREOPEN from prior commit
- Add test: write file to /tmp, list directory, read back, cleanup
- Reuse module-level _encoder/_decoder in python-do.ts run()/handleRequest()
